description_long: This house features a modern, boxy architectural design with multiple interlocking rectangular volumes and a flat roof. The exterior is clad in dark horizontal siding, contrasted by large, floor-to-ceiling windows that wrap around much of the structure, providing ample natural light and a sense of openness. The front entryway is defined by a covered porch with double doors and a paved walkway leading up to it. The upper story is set back from the lower levels, creating terraces and overhangs that add depth to the facade. The house includes several distinct sections, some with expansive glass walls, likely intended for living or communal spaces. The overall aesthetic is sleek and contemporary, emphasizing clean lines and geometric forms.
description: A modern, multi-story house with flat roofs, large glass windows, and a dark exterior. The design features interlocking rectangular volumes and a prominent, covered entryway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance with double doors, a covered porch, and a paved walkway, as well as extensive glass windows and a tiered, boxy structure.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the setback upper story, a large glass-walled section, and the continuation of the paved area to the left.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the long, horizontal expanse of the house, with prominent glass walls and minimal entry features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the upper terrace, additional glass walls, and the paved area extending from the main structure.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and glass walls
attribute_entryway_design: Covered entryway with double doors, paved walkway, and a projecting overhang
